user_system_path: Guardian commitment-title hygiene (#399). commitment-bridge.ts set the lapsing-commitment signal title to canonical_form (the SYNC:<category>:<slug> dedup key) over description, so the guardian card could read SYNC:payment_financial:Pay_the_invoice. New humanCommitmentTitle() prefers the human description and, as a fallback, strips the SYNC: prefix so the card is never cheap. Read-time display fix only — NO prod data mutation, NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #399: lib/workday-presence/commitment-bridge.ts (+ its test) for the human-title fix + control-plane + docs. Schema and dependency files stay forbidden — no migrations, no new deps.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**) or dependency (package*.json) changes in this seam. Read-time display fix only — no tkg_commitments row mutation. Any lib/app path outside the allowed list is out of scope.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npx vitest run lib/workday-presence/__tests__/commitment-bridge.test.ts
required_browser_proof: N/A — deterministic read-time display fix proven by fixtures; no paid generation needed.
browser_proof_command: N/A — no-paid directive; prove in harness
acceptance_condition: The guardian's lapsing-commitment title prefers the human description and never surfaces a raw SYNC:<category>:<slug> key (stripped fallback). commitment-bridge.test.ts green (incl. the updated key-vs-description test), and gate:continuity + lint + build pass.
anti_regression_checks: card title prefers description; SYNC: key never shown (prefix stripped in fallback)
findLapsingCommitmentSignal still returns null when nothing is due and still throws on query error
no paid API calls in any test
read-time display only — no tkg_commitments rows mutated
no schema or dependency files changed
stop_condition: Stop when the seam is merged (MERGED_AND_CLOSED) with harness proof, or blocked with an exact receipt.
next_command: OWNER-SIDE: configure the free external 15-min cron (guardian firing cadence) — the one live-readiness blocker. CODE: recolor legacy cyan favicons (BLOCKED on image tooling — sharp/imagemagick absent); triage stale branches + skipped tests.
